creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
a make fetch gives a file not found error for the original 
pike/Makefile. It looks like the ftp locations has been changed.

Fix: 

Change the MASTERSITE line to:
ftp://ftp.roxen.com/pub/pike/all/0.6.110/
or upgrade the port to the current version of 7.0.xx :-), but that
may be more work :-).
How-To-Repeat: Try a make fetch.
